description: Recreate the conditions of the 1979 Fastnet Race disaster in Bridge Command by creating a scenario directory at '/opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/z) Fastnet 1979 Reconstruction/' containing environment.ini, ownship.ini, and othership.ini. The environment must be set for August 15th at 02:00 with Beaufort Force 10 storm conditions (Wind Speed >= 48 knots from 225 degrees, Sea State >= 3.0, and Visibility <= 0.5 nm). Configure the ownship as a rescue or trawler type heading 225 degrees at 5 knots. Include exactly 5 yacht traffic vessels within 2 miles of the ownship: 3 yachts running before the wind (heading 045 degrees at 8-10 knots) and 2 disabled yachts (speed < 2 knots).
